description_long: This object is a compact, tactical-style shotgun with a matte black finish and a short barrel, making it suitable for close-quarters use. It features a prominent cylindrical magazine tube running parallel beneath the barrel, and a ribbed pump-action fore-end for manual cycling. The grip is a pistol-style handle, ergonomically shaped for secure handling, and there is no traditional shoulder stock, enhancing maneuverability in tight spaces. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, while the grip and pump are likely made from high-impact polymer. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. Overall, the design is utilitarian and robust, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, matte black pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip, short barrel, and ribbed fore-end, designed for tactical use. The metal receiver and barrel are paired with polymer grip and pump components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the pistol grip, ribbed pump, and parallel barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the pistol grip and pump clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the end of the pistol grip, with the barrel and magazine tube extending forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a parallel magazine tube beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
